# Incursa WorkOS Integration

Independent WorkOS integration repository for Incursa.

Primary solution: `Incursa.Integrations.WorkOS.slnx`.

## Modules

- Abstractions
- WorkOS provider package (runtime services, persistence adapters, host-agnostic app-auth contracts)
- ASP.NET Core integration

## Commands

- Restore: `dotnet restore Incursa.Integrations.WorkOS.slnx`
- Build: `dotnet build Incursa.Integrations.WorkOS.slnx -c Release`
- Test: `dotnet test --solution Incursa.Integrations.WorkOS.slnx -c Release`
- Pack: `pwsh -File scripts/pack.ps1`

## Scope Governance

Boundary policy: `docs/quality/repo-scope-boundary.md`.
